name: Retrogram
description: Retrogram (v4.1.4) is an app that brings a fully working, classic Instagram experience back to iOS 5 and iOS 6. By rerouting the dead network API requests of the vintage client base to a dedicated custom backend (hosted at sfproj's server architecture), this release bypasses modern SSL errors and dead official servers. It completely restores core features like loading feeds, viewing profiles, and registering accounts natively on vintage Apple hardware while preserving the original, skeuomorphic pre-2014 user interface.
device: iPhone 4 (GSM) (iPhone3,1), Apple A4, 512 MB RAM, iOS 5.1.1
